terms-of-service.title: Introduction
terms-of-service.description: Welcome to our terms of service. By using this app (“Qwantu”), you agree to the following terms:

terms-of-service.title: 1. License to Use
terms-of-service.description: We grant you a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable, limited license to download and use the App for personal expense tracking purposes.

terms-of-service.title: 2. Restrictions
terms-of-service.description: You agree not to: Modify, reverse-engineer, or tamper with the App’s code or functionality; Distribute, resell, or sublicense the App in any form; Use the App in any unlawful or unauthorized manner.

terms-of-service.title: 3. Ownership
terms-of-service.description: The App, its design, and underlying code remain the intellectual property of the developer. Your use of the App does not transfer any ownership rights.

terms-of-service.title: 4. Data Responsibility
terms-of-service.description: All data entered into the App is stored locally on your device. You are solely responsible for managing, backing up, and safeguarding your data.

terms-of-service.title: 5. Disclaimer of Warranties
terms-of-service.description: The App is provided “as is” without any warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee that the App will be error-free, uninterrupted, or meet your specific needs.

terms-of-service.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
terms-of-service.description: To the fullest extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any damages or losses arising from your use of the App, including but not limited to data loss, device issues, or unauthorized access to your device.

terms-of-service.title: 7. Feedback
terms-of-service.description: If you provide feedback or suggestions, you grant us the right to use this input to improve the App without any obligation to compensate you.

terms-of-service.title: 8. Changes to Terms
terms-of-service.description: We reserve the right to update or modify these Terms of Use at any time. Continued use of the App after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms.

privacy-policy.title: Introduction
privacy-policy.description: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting it. This Privacy Policy explains how our app 'Qwantu' handles your data and your personal information when you visit our website or use our app.

privacy-policy.title: 1. In-App Data Storage
privacy-policy.description: All of your expense data — including expenses, budgets, preferences, receipts, images, and other related records — is stored securely on your device only. We do not collect, transmit, or store your expense data on our servers.

privacy-policy.title: 2. Account Data storage
privacy-policy.description: The app collects and stores user emails for account login and user phone numbers used for account setup. These are only used to login and process setup/refunds and are not shared with any third parties.

privacy-policy.title: 3. Offline functionality
privacy-policy.description: All of your expense data and app functionality are fully available offline, only logins, profile information, refunds and account deletions require an internet connection.

privacy-policy.title: 4. Automatic Expense capture
privacy-policy.description: This is an opt-in feature that allows the app to automatically capture expenses from 'Mpesa'. Only Messages received from 'Mpesa' are used and of those, only the ones with a specific format are processed by the app. No sms message is accessed outside the device at any point, all processing is done natively on the device by the app. All your data is only available on your device no external storage is used.

privacy-policy.title: 5. Data Processing
privacy-policy.description: All expense tracking, parsing, and categorization features are executed locally on your device. No information is sent to external servers or third parties.

privacy-policy.title: 6. Data Export
privacy-policy.description: If you choose to export your data, the files are generated on your device. Once exported, it is your responsibility to manage and share these files. The App does not control or monitor where your exported data is sent.

privacy-policy.title: 7. Feedback and Support
privacy-policy.description: If you send us feedback via email, your message will be handled by your own device’s email client.

privacy-policy.title: 8. Third-Party Services
privacy-policy.description: No data is shared with or accessed by third-parties at any time while using the app.

privacy-policy.title: 9. Security
privacy-policy.description: Because your expense data never leaves your device, its protection depends on the security of your device itself. We recommend using standard device security measures (such as a passcode or biometric lock) to safeguard your information.

privacy-policy.title: 10. Updates to this Policy
privacy-policy.description: This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time to reflect changes in the App or legal requirements. Updates will be posted on our official website. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.

refund-policy.title: 1. General Refund Eligibility
refund-policy.description: Refunds are offered to select accounts under the following conditions; Refund requests must be submitted within five (5) calendar days from the date of purchase and requests must not be fraudulent.

refund-policy.title: 2. Refund Request Process
refund-policy.description: Once a refund request is submitted, the user’s account will be temporarily suspended, and login access will be restricted during the review period. We will review account activity and associated data, to determine the validity of the request.

refund-policy.title: 3. Fraud Review and Determination
refund-policy.description: If a refund request is determined to be fraudulent; The user will be notified via email of the decision their account will be deactivated, however if the user logs back into the account within 30 days, access will be restored with full functionality; the user will, however, no longer be eligible to request refunds in the future. If the user has questions or wishes to dispute the decision: they may respond by forwarding the decision email to our support team, we will review and respond accordingly.

refund-policy.title: 4. Approved Refunds
refund-policy.description: If a refund request is approved: The refund will be issued to the original payment method used at account creation. This method cannot be changed. The refunded amount will be the amount paid for account setup minus transaction and processing fees. An email confirmation, including an invoice, will be sent upon completion. Following a successful refund: the user’s account will be deactivated and will be restricted from signing up or logging in using the same email for a period of 30 days. After this period, access may be restored only upon repurchasing the account.

refund-policy.title: 5. Processing Timeline
refund-policy.description: All approved refunds, including those under the invite program, will be processed within 2-3 business days from the date of approval.

refund-policy.title: 6. Amendments
refund-policy.description: We reserve the right to modify or update this Refund Policy at any time without prior notice. Continued use of the application and the invite refund program constitutes acceptance of any revised terms. For any inquiries or support requests, users may contact our support team through the official communication channels provided within the application and this website.

invites-policy.title: Invites refund program
invites-policy.description: We offer an Invites Refund Program that select users can opt into to qualify for a full refund with no time limitation by inviting friends with their invite code, this program is completely optional and not necessary for any functionality of the application. This program is strictly promotional and does not constitute an investment opportunity, income stream, or financial return mechanism and is subject to our refund policy and the following terms.

invites-policy.title: 1. Program Participation
invites-policy.description: The select users who opt into the program will receive a unique invite code. This code may be shared with others and used during account setup.

invites-policy.title: 2. Invite Qualification
invites-policy.description: An invite is counted only when: A user sets up their account using the invite code and account setup is successfull. An invite will be removed if the invited user later requests and receives a refund.

invites-policy.title: 3. Refund Eligibility via invites
invites-policy.description: Opted in users become eligible for a full refund after successfully maintaining five (5) valid invites.

invites-policy.title: 4. Claim Waiting Period
invites-policy.description: Once eligibility is achieved, opted in users must wait seven (7) days before submitting a refund claim, this waiting period allows for potential refund requests from referred users to be processed.

invites-policy.title: 5. Invites Refund Processing
invites-policy.description: After submission, the refund request will undergo the same review and verification process as standard refunds. The user will be notified of the final decision via email.
